From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Ski mountaineering event series

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | The topic of this article **may not meet Wikipedia's [general notability guideline](/wiki/Wikipedia:Notability "Wikipedia:Notability")**. Please help to demonstrate the notability of the topic by citing [reliable secondary sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Reliable_sources "Wikipedia:Reliable sources") that are [independent](/wiki/Wikipedia:Independent_sources "Wikipedia:Independent sources") of the topic and provide significant coverage of it beyond a mere trivial mention. If notability cannot be shown, the article is likely to be [merged](/wiki/Wikipedia:Merging "Wikipedia:Merging"), [redirected](/wiki/Wikipedia:Redirect "Wikipedia:Redirect"), or [deleted](/wiki/Wikipedia:Deletion_policy "Wikipedia:Deletion policy"). *Find sources:* ["2001 European Championship of Ski Mountaineering"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%222001+European+Championship+of+Ski+Mountaineering%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%222001+European+Championship+of+Ski+Mountaineering%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%222001+European+Championship+of+Ski+Mountaineering%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%222001+European+Championship+of+Ski+Mountaineering%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%222001+European+Championship+of+Ski+Mountaineering%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%222001+European+Championship+of+Ski+Mountaineering%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(May 2023)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

The **2001 European Championship of Ski mountaineering** was the fourth [European Championship](/wiki/European_Championships_of_Ski_Mountaineering "European Championships of Ski Mountaineering") of [ski mountaineering](/wiki/Ski_mountaineering "Ski mountaineering") and the first, that was organized by the [International Council for Ski Mountaineering Competitions](/wiki/International_Council_for_Ski_Mountaineering_Competitions "International Council for Ski Mountaineering Competitions") (ISMC), that was founded in 1999 as a suborganization the [Union Internationale des Associations d'Alpinisme](/wiki/Union_Internationale_des_Associations_d%27Alpinisme "Union Internationale des Associations d'Alpinisme") (UIAA).

The events were held in [France](/wiki/France "France"), [Italy](/wiki/Italy "Italy") and [Spain](/wiki/Spain "Spain"). The team races of the "senior" and the "espoir" class were held at the French Miage-Contamines on 27 January 2001, the individual races in the [Jaca](/wiki/Jaca "Jaca"), Spain, on 4 March 2001, and the team races of the "cadett" and the "junior" classes in [Adamello](/wiki/Adamello "Adamello"), Italy, on 1 April 2001.[[1]](#cite_note-EM2001-1)
